summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Koarmada 3 Logistics Monitoring app. Backend: 32/32 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core flows working - login, dashboard, asset lists, asset detail, AI analysis, asset creation, role-based access. One issue found: R3F 3D viewer throws runtime errors in development mode due to dev tooling attribute injection.

ui_bugs.issue: R3F throws runtime error 'Cannot set x-line-number' in development mode. This is caused by development tooling injecting x-line-number attributes that conflict with React Three Fiber. The 3D viewer still renders but error overlay blocks UI interaction.

issues: Minor: HTML warning about <span> inside <option> in asset selector dropdown - cosmetic only

action_items: Fix R3F 3D viewer error by wrapping Canvas in error boundary or disabling dev tooling attributes for Three.js components
Optional: Fix HTML warning in AI Analysis asset selector (span inside option)
critical_code_review_comments: ShipViewer3D.jsx: Consider adding ErrorBoundary wrapper around Canvas to prevent error overlay from blocking UI
AIAnalysis.jsx line 76: Option element content should not contain span elements - use plain text interpolation
seed_data_creation: Seed data verified: 5 kapal (KRI Diponegoro 365, KRI Sultan Hasanuddin 366, KRI Bung Tomo 357, KRI Nanggala 402, KRI Banda Aceh 593) and 2 pangkalan (LTM-XIV, FSH-MKW)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully tested with pytest - all 32 tests pass. Frontend core flows work. The R3F 3D viewer error is a development-mode issue caused by dev tooling attribute injection (x-line-number). The error overlay blocks UI but the 3D viewer itself renders. AI Analysis with Claude Sonnet 4.5 works correctly. Role-based access control verified for admin/operator/viewer roles.
